calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anne H. Hartman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Goodin, MacBride, Squeri, Day & lamprey, LLP.
Ms. Hartman was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Maritime Communications/Land Mobile, LLC.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Mobex Network Services, Inc. was filed on January 14, 2010.
Default was entered as to defendant Maritime Communications/Land Services, LLC on January 14, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Goodin, Mac Bride, Squeri, Day & Lamprey, LLP, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maritime Communications/Land Mobile, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $88,742.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,466.21.
Costs - $365.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $103,573.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Continued To May-24-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
